title: Iran attacks US bases and closes the Strait of Hormuz, sending oil prices soaring
summary: The conflict between Iran and the US escalates with Iranian attacks on military bases and the disruption of maritime traffic in the Strait of Hormuz, driving up oil and impacting global markets.

title: Global stock markets close higher on July 9
summary: Wall Street, Germany's DAX, Japan's Nikkei, and the Swiss market record gains in a positive session.

title: SK Hynix's IPO on Wall Street is oversubscribed and generates a $140 million payout
summary: The initial public offering of the South Korean chipmaker captures investor interest and becomes a test for artificial intelligence stocks.

title: Semiconductor stocks surge driven by AI demand
summary: Companies like Lumentum and SanDisk lead gains, while the Direxion Semiconductor ETF surges and Asian markets rise driven by US chip stocks.

title: Micron accelerates its US investments and Netlist anticipates a rebound due to rising memory prices
summary: Micron's massive investment and rising memory prices fuel optimism in the chip sector.

title: AstraZeneca plummets on stock market after failure of a heart disease trial
summary: The British pharmaceutical company suffers a sharp decline after failing to meet the objectives of a key clinical trial.

title: Meta launches a new AI model and develops its own chip with a $145 billion budget
summary: Mark Zuckerberg's company pushes the boundaries of AI and reduces its reliance on external suppliers.

title: Tesla introduces AI assistant Grok in its vehicles in Japan to provide information during driving
summary: The Grok chatbot is integrated into Tesla's electric cars in Japan, as analysts debate the company's value.

title: European Central Bank keeps rate path open and inflation remains persistent
summary: Minutes from the June meeting show inflation is more persistent than expected, and the ECB does not specify future rate hikes.

title: SpaceX stock recovers on Wall Street after bearish pressure from analysts linked to Santander
summary: SpaceX shows signs of recovery after Santander allies lowered its valuation.

title: Global energy supply concerns grow due to Russian export cuts and gas shortages
summary: Reduction in Russian diesel exports and gas shortages in Europe worsen the global energy crisis.

title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT Work, intensifying competition in AI tools for the workplace
summary: OpenAI's new tool seeks to deepen its presence in the AI market for office work.

title: Elon Musk describes Anthropic as the current leader in artificial intelligence
summary: Musk acknowledges Anthropic as the leading competitor in the AI race, ahead of other companies like OpenAI.

title: US Environmental Protection Agency proposes easing emission standards for heavy trucks
summary: The EPA eases regulations on truck emissions, a change from the Biden administration's policies.

title: New York sues 3M, DuPont, and other companies for contamination with persistent toxic chemicals
summary: The state accuses manufacturers of harming the environment and public health with 'forever chemicals'.

title: Volkswagen faces crucial talks on plant closures and job cuts
summary: Volkswagen management and unions negotiate drastic measures to reduce costs amid the electric transition.

title: Goldman Sachs prohibits its employees from trading in prediction markets
summary: The investment bank restricts participation in political and event bets to avoid conflicts of interest.

title: Oracle remains stable despite S&P downgrade and its high $160 billion debt
summary: S&P downgrades Oracle's rating to 'BBB-', but the market downplays the impact for now.

title: GE Vernova shows strength on the stock market but analysts warn of significant risk
summary: Despite its strong stock performance, the energy company faces challenges that could weigh on its share price.

title: Rocket Lab shares have surged 118% in the past year, but is it time to buy?
summary: The space company has experienced a strong rally, but investors wonder if there is still upside potential.
